nasb.text: But be that as it may, I did not burden you myself; nevertheless, crafty fellow that I am, I took you in by deceit.

esv.text: But granting that I myself did not burden you, I was crafty, you say, and got the better of you by deceit.

cnv.text: 算了！我沒有成為你們的重擔，卻是個狡猾的人，用詭計牢籠你們。

ccb.text: 算了！我没有拖累过你们，但居然有人说我狡猾，用诡计骗你们。

csbs.text: 不过就算如此，我也没有成为你们的负担——难道我是狡猾的人，用诡计牢笼了你们吗？
